prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: I woke up. It happened. I'm not really sure how or why, but I did. The experience was...fine. The darkness receded and the room became visible, which was a thing that happened. My body was in the bed, and then it was not. I stood up and began to exist in a state of moderate alertness. The whole ordeal was fairly uneventful, but it did occur. I wouldn't say it was particularly enjoyable or unpleasant, it just was. I'd give it 3 stars, I guess. Would wake up again, but only because I have to.
